name: Shadow Enemy
original_name: ชาติพยัคฆ์คมนักเลง
overview: When evil rises, there is a great need for the devilish flames to be extinguished. When danger trembles Ban Pha Fa Rong, help is needed urgently. However, this time it is not easy because the opponent has black magic on their side to help. Two young men with divine powers must join forces with the beautiful daughter of a notable man and fight the evil that threatens to ruin Ban Pha Fa Rong.

trailers.title: ชาติพยัคฆ์ คมนักเลง [Official Trailer] Ver.8
